sections.paragraph:
Original: חלב חלב

Transliteration: cheleb chêleb

Phonetic: kheh'-leb

BDB Definition:

  1. fat
    1. fat (of humans)
    2. fat (of beasts)
    3. choicest, best part, abundance (of products of the land)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be fat

TWOT entry: 651a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
